sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Palantir Technologies Inc.의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 4분기 매출은 전년 동기 대비 70% 증가한 14억 700만 달러를 기록했으며, 미국 상업 부문 매출은 137% 급증했습니다.
2026년 연간 매출 성장률 가이던스를 61%, 미국 상업 부문 매출 성장률 가이던스를 115%로 제시했습니다.
Rule of 40 점수 127%를 달성하며 운영 효율성과 AI 모델 확장을 통한 수익성 개선을 입증했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 100만 달러 이상의 계약 180건, 500만 달러 이상 84건, 1,000만 달러 이상 61건을 체결하며 대형 고객 기반을 확대했습니다.
전체 고객 수는 전년 대비 34% 증가하며 지속적인 사업 확장을 보였습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 GAAP 영업이익은 5억 7,500만 달러(마진 41%), 조정 영업이익은 7억 9,800만 달러(마진 57%)를 기록했습니다.

watchItems.text: 제시된 2026년 매출 성장률 61% 가이던스를 달성하기 위한 미국 상업 부문의 지속적인 모멘텀 유지 여부.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 a2025q4ex991earningsrelease.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Palantir Reports Q4 2025 U.S. Comm Revenue Growth of 137% Y/Y and Revenue Growth of 70% Y/Y; Issues FY 2026 Revenue Guidance of 61% Y/Y and U.S. Comm Revenue Guidance of 115% Y/Y, Crushing Consensus Expectations February 2, 2026 DENVER — (BUSINESS WIRE) — Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:PLTR) today announced financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. “Palantir’s Rule of 40 score is now an incredible 127%. Last quarter, our U.S. revenue grew 93% year-over-year and U.S. commercial revenue grew 137% year-over-year. We are also announcing a 2026 revenue growth guide of 61% year-over-year. We are an n of 1, and these numbers prove it. Palantir is alone in choosing to exclusively focus on scaling the operational leverage made possible by the rapid advancements of AI models, a trend

that we first called ‘commodity cognition’ well before others started repeating it,” said Alex C. Karp, Co-Founder and Chief Executive Officer of Palantir Technologies. Q4 2025 Highlights • U.S. revenue grew 93% year-over-year and 22% quarter-over-quarter to $1.076 billion ◦ U.S. commercial revenue grew 137% year-over-year and 28% quarter-over-quarter to $507 million ◦ U.S. government revenue grew 66% year-over-year and 17% quarter-over-quarter to $570 million • Revenue grew 70% year-over-year and 19% quarter-over-quarter to $1.407 billion • Closed 180 deals of at least $1 million, 84 deals of at least $5 million, and 61 deals of at least $10  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.076 billion = 10억 7,600만 달러; $507 million = 5억 700만 달러; $570 million = 5억 7,000만 달러; $1.407 billion = 14억 700만 달러; $1 million = 100만 달러; $5 million = 500만 달러; $10 million = 1,000만 달러; $4.262 billion = 42억 6,200만 달러; $1.076 = 1.076달러; $5 = 5달러; $1 = 1달러; $10 = 10달러; $4.262 = 4.262달러; $1.344 = 1.344달러; $4.38 = 4.38달러.

billion, up 145% year-over-year and 21% quarter-over-quarter • Customer count grew 34% year-over-year and 5% quarter-over-quarter • GAAP income from operations of $575 million, representing a 41% margin • Adjusted income from operations of $798 million, representing a 57% margin • Rule of 40 score of 127% • GAAP net income of $609 million, representing a 43% margin • Cash from operations of $777 million, representing a 55% margin • Adjusted free cash flow of $791 million, representing a 56% margin • GAAP earnings per share (“EPS”) of $0.24 • Adjusted EPS of $0.25 • Cash, cash equivalents, and short-term U.S. Treasury se  Normalized numeric aliases: $575 million = 5억 7,500만 달러; $798 million = 7억 9,800만 달러; $609 million = 6억 900만 달러; $777 million = 7억 7,700만 달러; $791 million = 7억 9,100만 달러; $7.2 billion = 72억 달러; $3.320 billion = 33억 2,000만 달러; $1.465 billion = 14억 6,500만 달러; $575 = 575달러; $0.24 = 0.24달러; $1.855 = 1.855달러; $0.25 = 0.25달러; $7.2 = 7.2달러; $3.320 = 3.320달러; $1.465 = 1.465달러.
